Bloodfeud.description: Forged in endless clan blood feuds — each piece fuels mana surges, stealth evasion, or tanking stances depending on material.

Wraithfang.description: Whispers forgotten grudges — shadow magic for cloth, backstab crits for leather, fear procs for metal.

Oathbreaker.description: Breaks oaths of peace — cleansing and debuff mechanics across all materials.

Kinrend.description: Rends bonds of blood — healing and lifesteal focus for sustain builds.

Dusksinger.description: Twilight movement — speed bursts, teleports, and mobility enhancement.

Emberclad.description: Burning hatred — fire damage over time and damage reflection.
